name: Nut/seed Mylk
method: Soak the nuts/seeds, if you wish. Process all the ingredients in a blender. Place a fine-meshed sieve over a deep bowl, or use a nut-milk bag, for draining the mylk. Pour the mylk into bottles and keep them refrigerated. Mylk made with soaked nuts/seeds has a shelf life of 2 days, non-soaked, up to 3–4 days.
